---
title: "Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita"
---

This page analyzes the relationship between life expectancy and GDP per capita in the Gapminder dataset.

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
#| fig-cap: "Life expectancy vs GDP per capita"
#| label: fig-life-gdp

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

plt.scatter(df["gdp_per_capita"], df["life_expectancy"], alpha=0.5)
plt.xscale("log")
plt.xlabel("GDP per capita (log scale)")
plt.ylabel("Life expectancy")
plt.title("Life Expectancy vs GDP per Capita")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

As shown in @fig-life-gdp, countries with higher GDP per capita tend to have higher life expectancy.
